name: ドラゴンボール レジェンズ

detail.description:
The highly anticipated Dragon Ball action game is now available on smartphones.

This action game features 3D graphics and full voice acting during battles, delivering a thrilling battle experience!

Engage in spectacular battles with just one finger for the ultimate action game experience!


- An intuitive action game that can be enjoyed with just one finger!
- Unleash combos and special moves with a single tap!


- A full-scale action game where you can battle players from all over the world i
detail.recentChanges:
8周年に向けた大型アップデート！
・ミッションプランをリニューアル！
従来の各プランを統合し、新たなプレミアムプランが登場！
ミッションを達成して、刻の結晶などさまざまな報酬をGetしよう！
・その他、様々なUIを調整しました
